name: Moon Bowl Ramen
description: A completely fictional neighborhood ramen bar created to demonstrate Ramen Radar. It does not exist and should not be visited.

coverImage.alt: Illustration of a glowing ramen bowl beneath a crescent moon
coverImage.caption: Original fictional example artwork

gallery.alt: Illustration of the fictional Moon Bowl storefront at night
gallery.caption: The imaginary storefront

visits.notes: A made-up first visit during the fictional opening week. The broth was the clear favorite.

dishes.name: Crescent Shoyu
dishes.notes: Chicken-soy broth, roasted tomato, and straight noodles

dishes.name: Lunar Miso
dishes.notes: Red miso, corn, butter, and curly noodles

reviews.notes: Balanced and comforting. I would order the shoyu again.
Excellent broth, though the noodles could use more bite.

visits.notes: A fictional rainy-evening return for the spicy bowl.

photos.alt: Stylized illustration representing the spicy ramen served on the return visit
photos.caption: Example visit image

dishes.name: Dark-Side Tantanmen
dishes.notes: Sesame, chili, minced mushroom, and bok choy

reviews.notes: Better noodles this time; the spice lingered nicely.
Only rated the parts I paid attention to.
